data.content: Plan not approved. The proposed production change may be correct, but the test plan currently misses the real page composition: multi-select mode swaps FilterControls out for BulkEditControls, so the expected pulldown count is wrong, and a FilterBar-only story would not exercise RepoSwitcher. Next plan revision should target a page-level or equivalent composed scenario with multi-select active, automate stability checks for RepoSwitcher plus the bulk-edit pulldowns, and include non-zero scroll verification so layout-jump assertions are meaningful.
